description_long: This object consists of a short sword with a broad, straight blade and a matching wooden sheath. The blade is metallic with a patterned surface, suggesting either decorative etching or a damascus-style finish. The handle is cylindrical, made of dark wood, and capped with a rounded metal pommel and a flat, circular guard. The sheath is also wooden, matching the handle in color and texture, and is shaped to fit the blade snugly. The overall design is reminiscent of historical or fantasy short swords, with a robust and practical appearance. The materials and construction suggest it is both functional and visually striking, suitable for display or use.
description: A short sword with a patterned metal blade, wooden handle, and matching wooden sheath, featuring a circular guard and pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full patterned blade, wooden handle, circular guard, and the sheath placed beside the sword.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the guard and pommel visible from above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade and sheath, with the wooden textures more prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade's edge alignment and the handle's cylindrical shape.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical wooden handle with a rounded metal pommel and flat circular guard
